name: Beef Stew, Crock #2
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Beef chuck or stew meat, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place meat in crock pot.
2. Mix flour, salt and pepper and pour over meat; stir to coat meat with flour.
3. Add remaining ingredients and stir to mix well.
4. Cover and cook on low (200°F) for 10 to 12 hours or high (300°F) for 4 to 6 hours.
5. Stir stew thoroughly before serving.
